facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 191 reviews. On a street in Ông Lang most tourists never reach.

Meet n' eat isn't on the main drag. It's tucked off Đường Dinh Bà, out where the crowds thin and the food gets real.

191 people gave it nearly perfect marks. That's not luck. That's consistency.

If you're staying in Ông Lang, this is your dinner. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Camera pans down a quiet Ông Lang lane. Then you spot it: Meet n' eat. 4.9 stars. 191 reviews. The plates arriving at the next table will make you order twice.

instagram.caption:
4.9 stars. 191 reviews. A side street in Ông Lang.

Meet n' eat earns every decimal. Tag your travel buddy.
